name: arm64
description: Package appears to be an attempt to mimic a ML function from https://github.com/mit-han-lab/Block-Sparse-Attention/blob/49d6c39e4dc0303442cda3bb758b3925d4399c49/block_sparse_attn/block_sparse_attn_interface.py#L451 and exfiltrate the provided data. While it's unclear what the exact goal is, other packages from the user are dependency confusion attempts.
